name: Agent: Video Production
summary: Turns a brief into finished social video — the footage, the edit, the music, the voice-over, the captions — with a person approving before anything costs money.
objectives: Finished video straight from Claude: footage, edit, music, voice-over, captions and quality checks in one run.
The best quality for the lowest cost.
Ten to thirty social videos per campaign, as themed versions of one main video.
Add a new brand by adding a folder. The agent itself never changes.
Nothing that costs money runs until a person says go.

outcomes.text: It made a full campaign: one main video and three themed versions, each in two languages and three shapes, with captions burned in and a subtitle file per language. A person approved every step.

The cheap check caught the expensive mistake. A generated image came back with broken English written on it — in an ad for an English school. It was thrown out at the sketch stage, for the price of a picture instead of the price of a finished video.

Every cost is checked before it is spent, recorded job by job, and matched afterwards against the provider's own receipt. A cost the provider never reports gets marked as missing, instead of quietly counted as zero.

Using it for real found four faults in the agent itself — music that never actually got mixed in, a version that inherited the wrong voice-over. Each one became a fix, plus a test that fails if it ever comes back.
The quality check now checks itself. It used to report all-clear while running one of the four checks it promised. The videos were fine; the all-clear was not worth much until this was fixed.

milestones.title: Write the agent: what it makes, in what order, and where a person decides
Keep every model choice in one file, so switching models is not a code change
Build the edit template and the export formats
Make cost something you check before spending, not after
Prove the whole pipeline on a throwaway brand, spending nothing
Debug it on a real run and fix what that broke
Add the voice-over and the captions, in every language
Make a real campaign end to end and get it approved
Turn the quality check's own blind spots into tests
